specific_location: On the north side of the road at the intersection of CR38 and Highway 50.
description: A large light colored dove was sitting on a sign at the west end of the town of Gunnison. It was noticably larger than a White-winged or Mourning Dove. It had a black band on the back of the neck. It had a long square tail with very little black. The black was towards the undertail coverts while the rest of the underpart of the tail was white. The Dove had dark primaries.Behaviors: The bird was sitting on top of a sign. I never saw it fly.Call: Didn't hear itPlumage: Adult
